overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a dirt path through sunflower fields and a rustic Slavic-style village. The scene transitions from open countryside into a wooden settlement and back to fields under bright summer sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunflower farm path between blooming fields

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path between tall sunflower fields, swords visible on his back

entered.detail: dense field of blooming yellow sunflowers lining the left side of the path
dense field of blooming yellow sunflowers lining the right side of the path
worn dirt trail with patches of grass running through the center
tall evergreen tree standing alone at the end of the path
distant forest forming the horizon backdrop

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a wide dirt path flanked by dense sunflower fields under a bright partly cloudy sky. The landscape is open and rural with a large pine tree visible in the distance marking the path ahead.

events.description: first wooden farmhouse becomes visible at the end of the sunflower path

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the path as the first buildings of a rural village come into view

entered.detail: traditional log cabin with dark wooden walls and pitched roof
rustic wooden fence marking property boundary
small wooden house with weathered logs

segments.scene_description: As Geralt approaches the village, wooden farmhouses emerge at the end of the path. The sunflower fields give way to fenced properties, and the spatial layout transitions from open fields to a more enclosed village approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: village main street with traditional wooden cottages

events.description: white goose runs across the dirt path from left to right in front of Geralt

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the village center between rows of wooden houses, passing villagers and livestock

notable_agents.action: villager in red clothing standing near a cottage doorway
white goose crossing the path quickly from left to right

entered.detail: cluster of traditional log cottages with thatched and shingled roofs
white cloth garments hanging on a line between buildings
low stone wall bordering the right side of the path
elevated wooden platform with hanging cage structure

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through the heart of the village between closely packed wooden cottages with thatched roofs. The street is narrow with stone walls and wooden fences, villagers are visible near their homes, and a white goose darts across the path. Laundry hangs on lines between buildings, creating a lived-in rural atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: countryside path exiting village toward sunflower fields

events.description: exiting the village back into open countryside with sunflower fields

agents.ego_description: Geralt leaving the village behind and returning to the open path between fields

entered.detail: tall wooden structure with platform visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Geralt exits the village and the scene opens back up into wide countryside. The wooden cottages fall behind as sunflower fields return to dominate the right side of the path. A wooden watchtower stands in the distance to the left as the path continues toward the forested horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open rural landscape into a dense rustic village and back out into the wide countryside. It begins with Geralt walking along a wide dirt path flanked by dense sunflower fields under a bright, partly cloudy sky, moving toward a distant pine tree. As the path narrows, the open fields give way to fenced properties and wooden farmhouses that signal the entrance to a settlement. The scene then shifts into the heart of the village, weaving between closely packed thatched-roof cottages and stone walls where laundry hangs on lines and a white goose darts across the path. Finally, the camera follows Geralt as he exits the village, and the environment opens back up into expansive sunflower fields with a wooden watchtower appearing in the distance toward a forested horizon.
